examples: The marker of liveability for a city is its human scale.
Vancouver has topped the annual Global Liveability Survey since 2002, but this year fell to third behind Vienna.
The importance of liveability in Danish culture is exemplified in the sustainable infrastructure of its capital city.
It is sometimes difficult to reconcile preservation with liveability, but it should also be remembered that the castle itself, like all castles, is not some cryogenated product of the 13th century.
